name: been-there-frontend-assets
description: Frontend asset manifest for BeenThere (Leaflet + Bootstrap plugins)

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/bootstrap && cp -R node_modules/bootstrap/dist/* src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/bootstrap/ || true && mkdir -p src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet && cp -R node_modules/leaflet/dist/* src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet/ || true && mkdir -p src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet.markercluster && cp -R node_modules/leaflet.markercluster/dist/* src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet.markercluster/ || true && mkdir -p src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet.heat && cp -R node_modules/leaflet.heat/dist/* src/BeenThere.Web/wwwroot/lib/leaflet.heat/ || true
